articles.title: AI inference startup Baseten reportedly raising $1.5B months after its last mega-round
articles.description: Startup Baseten is reportedly close to finalizing a $1.5 billion round at a $13 billion as the “inference gold rush" marches on.
articles.author: Dominic-Madori Davis

articles.title: Snap spins off AI video team into new company, Dotmo, due to costs
articles.description: The Snapchat maker is spinning off yet another internal unit. Dotmo will be composed of current Snap staff who are leaving the social media company
articles.author: Lucas Ropek

articles.title: OpenAI is bringing on some big guns in the lead-up to its IPO
articles.description: OpenAI is bulking up before its IPO, landing Transformer co-inventor Noam Shazeer from Google DeepMind and former Trump AI policy official Dean Ball
articles.author: Rebecca Bellan

articles.title: The 11 standout startups from YC’s Demo Day, according to VCs

articles.title: Rivian owners file lawsuit alleging false promises on self-driving features
articles.description: Plaintiffs in the class -action complaint allege Rivian falsely promised for years it would bring hands-free driving to its first-generation R1
articles.author: Kirsten Korosec

articles.title: Almost half of US singles feel negatively about AI in dating, Match says
articles.description: About 47% of singles look negatively at the use of AI in dating -- but many dating app users are open to AI helping with profile punch-ups and
articles.author: Amanda Silberling

articles.title: Amazon hopes to challenge Nvidia more directly by selling its AI chips
articles.description: AWS is in talks to sell its chips to other data centers. CEO Andy Jassy has said this represents a $50 billion opportunity for the company.
articles.author: Julie Bort

articles.title: Mivo’s new app takes a mindful approach to managing screen time
articles.description: Notably, unlike other apps that might just try to pull you away from your phone, Mivo lets the user decide if they want to continue, encouraging
articles.author: Lauren Forristal

articles.title: AI data centers just got a government-mandated fast lane to the grid
articles.description: FERC told grid operators to give data centers a fast lane for interconnections, but it failed to address electricity supply shortages.
articles.author: Tim De Chant

articles.title: The smartphone era created an attention crisis — slow tech is fixing it
articles.description: “People just really want to take back control of their time, their lives, their attention... They’re down for whatever helps them do that.”
articles.author: Amanda Silberling

articles.title: Texas government data breach allowed hackers to steal 3 million driver’s licenses and passports
articles.description: A data breach involving government-issued ID documents affects over 3 million people in Texas.
articles.author: Zack Whittaker

articles.title: ‘Queer Eye’ life coach Karamo Brown launches Kē, a wellness app featuring his AI digital clone
articles.description: After spending a year and a half focusing on his own journey — from fitness and nutrition to meditation, sobriety, relationships, and personal growth

articles.title: Apple opens up App Store to new competition in Brazil
articles.description: Apple’s grip on iPhone app distribution is loosening in another major market: Brazil.

articles.title: MapTap, a daily geography game, is my new Wordle
articles.description: MapTap is a phone game that will make you feel smarter after you play it.

articles.title: General Intuition in talks to raise $300M at around $2B valuation
articles.description: The startup trains embodied AI and world models using Medal’s dataset of 2 billion videos per year from 10 million monthly active users.

articles.title: A tech worker-backed PAC is bringing a $5M knife to Big Tech’s $100M gunfight
articles.description: Guardrails positions itself as a populist political movement that runs on small donations from people in the trenches of the AI boom.
articles.author: Rebecca Bellan

articles.title: Spotify’s reserved ticket sales to music superfans are now going live
articles.description: Spotify is launching "Reserved," a new system that will hold two concert tickets for an artist's superfans before they're on sale to the public.
articles.author: Sarah Perez

articles.title: NASA picks Eric Schmidt’s rocket company for Mars mission, setting up a race with SpaceX

articles.title: How to turn off AI in your Google Docs
articles.description: Here's what you need to do to get those pesky "write with Gemini" pop-ups to go away.
